rationale: The page contains detailed information about various geographical features in the news, including their locations, characteristics, and associated events. This content is highly informative and suitable for generating multiple questions.
cleanedText:
7.2. INTERNATIONAL
7.2.1. GEOGRAPHICAL FEATURES IN NEWS
World: Geographical Features in News
Davis Strait Proto-Microcontinent
Scientists discovered a hidden continent beneath Greenland's ice, called Davis Strait Proto-Microcontinent.
Proto-Microcontinents are "regions of relatively thick continental lithosphere separated from major continents by a zone of thinner continental lithosphere."
Located beneath the Davis Strait (connects Labrador Sea and Baffin Bay).
Arctic Biome
Wildfires around the globe are reducing its carbon absorbing capacity.
Location: North of the Arctic Circle (66° 33'N), includes areas of Alaska, Canada, Greenland, and Russia.
Permafrost is a defining characteristic.
Vegetation: With no deep root systems (mosses, lichens, dwarf shrubs, grasses, and sedges).
Kamchatka Peninsula
Five powerful earthquakes struck offshore in Russia's Kamchatka Peninsula.
Location: Russian Far East on the Pacific Ring of Fire.
Surrounded by Bering Sea and Pacific Ocean (east) and Sea of Okhotsk (west).
Kuril Archipelago (disputed between Russia and Japan) extends from the southern tip of Russia's Kamchatka Peninsula to the northeastern coast of Japan's Hokkaido Island.
Perito Moreno glacier
Facing ice loss by calving.
Location: Los Glaciares National Park - a UNESCO World Heritage Site in Argentina.
Called 'White Giant'.
Turtle Islands
Nyangai in the Turtle Islands off southern Sierra Leone lost two-thirds of its surface area due to rise in sea level.
Drake Passage
Magnitude 7.5 earthquake has struck drake passage near Argentina and Chile.
Location: Between Cape Horn (southernmost point of South America) and South Shetland Islands (north of Antarctic Peninsula).
Water majorly flows from west to east and forms part of the Antarctic Circumpolar Current.
Known for stormy seas and icy conditions.
Arun-3 Hydroelectric Project
India-Nepal inaugurated commencement of electromechanical works.
Location: Arun River (Tributary of Kosi) in Nepal.
Scarborough Shoal
Philippines condemned China's move to set up a nature reserve here.
Also called Huangyan Island in China and Panatag Shoal in Philippines.
A small atoll in the South China Sea.
